headline: Caterpillar Invests in the Future of Texas' Manufacturing Workforce
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) today announced the launch of its workforce commitment in Texas, marking another meaningful step in its five-year, $100 million Building the Future Workforce Initiative. With an initial allocation of up to $5 million, the funding aims to prepare current and future workers across Texas for advanced manufacturing and industry technician jobs of tomorrow.

headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.

headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock Faces Michael Burry Short As Valuation Questions Grow
summary: Michael Burry has opened a high profile short position in Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT), reversing his previous bullish stance. He is publicly flagging what he sees as extreme valuation and overexposure to the AI and infrastructure theme despite record company performance. The move comes as Caterpillar has been added to the Russell Top 50 Index and continues to be framed as an AI infrastructure beneficiary. Caterpillar sits at the center of several powerful themes, from large scale infrastructure...
